title: Find Minimum in Rotated Sorted Array
description: Given an array of n elements that is sorted and then rotated at some unknown pivot, find the minimum element in the array. You may assume no duplicate exists in the array.

examples.explanation: The array is rotated at index 2. The minimum element is 1.
The array is rotated at index 3. The minimum element is 0.
The array is not rotated; hence the first element is the minimum, which is 1.

constraints: The input array must have at least one element.
The length of array is within the range [1, 5000].
hints: Consider using binary search to reduce the search space.
Identify the point where the rotation occurs.
Compare the middle element with the rightmost element to decide which side to search.
Remember that the minimum element will always be less than its neighbors.
